shellCommands.command: python3 -m pip install --user build 2>&1 | tail -3 && python3 -m build --wheel 2>&1
python3 -m venv /home/user/workspace/venv && source /home/user/workspace/venv/bin/activate && pip install build 2>&1 | tail -3

source venv/bin/activate && nohup python3 -m pypiserver run --port 8080 --passwords=. --disable-fallback /home/user/workspace/packages > /home/user/workspace/pypiserver.log 2>&1 &
echo "PID: $!"

source /home/user/workspace/venv/bin/activate && nohup python3 -m pypiserver run --port 8080 -a . -P . --disable-fallback /home/user/workspace/packages > /home/user/workspace/pypiserver.log 2>&1 &
echo "PID: $!"
python3 -m venv /tmp/test_venv && source /tmp/test_venv/bin/activate && pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 2>&1

source /tmp/test_venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]); print('Success: dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]) =', dotproduct([1,1], [0,1])); print('dotproduct([2,3,4], [5,6,7]) =', dotproduct([2,3,4], [5,6,7]))"
ps aux | grep pypiserver | grep -v grep
